title: AI Safety at the Frontier: Paper Highlights of May & June 2026

whyItMatters: tl;dr Paper of the month: Anthropic’s Jacobian lens reveals that models have a sparse workspace of verbalizable concepts that causally carries multi-hop reasoning and surfaces hidden cognition — as opposed to other, more automatic mental processing.
